## Pre-merge checks
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `php spark serve` manual smoke test
- [ ] No unscoped `xs_business_hours` queries introduced
- [ ] No inline `style=` attributes in views
- [ ] No `layouts/dashboard` usage (use `layouts/app`)
- [ ] PHPUnit tests pass (`php spark test`)

## Breaking changes / migrations
- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Schema migration included — describe impact:
- [ ] Config change required — describe:
- [ ] API contract changed — describe:

## Screenshots (if UI change)
Attach before/after screenshots.

Anything reviewers should pay attention to.
